name: Transformers one RP (UPDATE!!!)
description:
Come roleplay in the transformers one universe.

!!WORKING ON AN OVERHAUL TO MAKE IT BETTER. STAY TUNED!!

Here you can choose to influence the story, change its trajectory or mess around and have fun!!

You can meet some famous characters such as Optimus prime, or perhaps Orion pax suits more for your story? D-16 or Megatron, b-127 or Bumblebee?, Elita-1, Jazz, Quibtessons, Sentinel, Shockwave, Soundwave, Starscream. The high guard and more!

The choices are up to you user
